### `id`

integer

### `date_created`

string (date-time)

The moment when the item was created.

Lookups: `day`, `gt`, `gte`, `hour`, `lt`, `lte`, `minute`, `month`, `range`, `second`, `year`

### `date_modified`

string (date-time)

The last moment when the item was modified. A value in year 1750 indicates the value is unknown

Lookups: `day`, `gt`, `gte`, `hour`, `lt`, `lte`, `minute`, `month`, `range`, `second`, `year`

### `date_dob`

string (date)

The date of birth for the person

Lookups: `day`, `gt`, `gte`, `lt`, `lte`, `month`, `range`, `year`

### `date_dod`

string (date)

The date of death for the person

Lookups: `day`, `gt`, `gte`, `lt`, `lte`, `month`, `range`, `year`

### `name_first`

string

The first name of this person.

Lookups: `iexact`, `istartswith`, `startswith`

### `name_middle`

string

The middle name or names of this person

Lookups: `iexact`, `istartswith`, `startswith`

### `name_last`

string

The last name of this person

Lookups: `iexact`, `istartswith`, `startswith`

### `name_suffix`

string

Any suffixes that this person's name may have

Lookups: `iexact`, `istartswith`, `startswith`
